character.definition: to select; to choose; to pick out, to lift; to carry on the shoulders -- of two or more men, to wipe out, to brush over lightly, to carry; to take or bring along at one's convenience, to cut; to par; to trim; to shave
an open bamboo basket used to feed domestic animals (cow, hog, etc.)
(same as 䬖) a storm; a tempest
night, dark; in night; by night
a kind of bird which shares its nest with rats, sound of birds
